title: Cobblemon DrifLoot - Customizable LootCrate
description: Cobblemon Drifloot introduces a customizable way to get rewards in your Cobblemon world.
body:
# Core Features

- The Drifkey : A key to call a Drifloot anywhere in the world. It places a block where you click, plays an animation of landing, then waits for you to right click it. When done, it plays the animation of taking off then the chest loots from a loot_table.

- Shiny Drifloot : 10% chance of having a shiny drifblim that loots from a special loot_table with better loot.

- **Customization** : Both the loot_tables and the chance of shiny drifloot can be customized in the config files (/config/cobblemondrifloot) ; you'll find a normal loot_table, the shiny loot_table and the 'settings' to change the % of shiny.

- You can give the keys to players as a reward in your servers with friends ! Have a great time ;) !

Don't hesitate to give any feedback, ideas or your struggles and need for a tutorial to make that config folder works !
I tested with a quick loot table, not a really complex one (as I'm planning to use on my own server with friends, so we might get a quick 1.0.0-hotfix soon) so let me know !

I know I'm not the best animator, I tried to make it the smoothest as I can, same for texturing of the chest (and I really like it, please do not criticise it.) but if by any means you want to make it better, I can gladly transfer you everything you need !
This mod is free to use, distribute, modified etc...
Meaning I'm not responsible for any abusing money abuse (and well I mean... if you want to do that, you'd rather ask someone to dev a better looking lootcrates dude)
But meaning that we can collab anytime, or you can copy the code whenever you want ! I don't think the code is obsfuscated but if needed I can make a quick Github branch :)


Made with MCreator.
